question: Which segment holds the largest share of the population in the last year shown?

options.A: Segment C, represented by the large purple area, holds the largest share.
options.B: Segment D, represented by the brown area at the top, holds the largest share.
options.C: Segment B, represented by the red area, holds the largest share.
options.D: Cannot determine which segment holds the largest share without a legend to explain which color represents each segment.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
